title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 17.5%.

items.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Ian always great value. A sign of how lost some people on this website are that they are salivating at the prospect of what would be a catastrophic sign for the Labour party…because Andy Burnham is a threat to St Keir.
items.content_text: Ian always great value. A sign of how lost some people on this website are that they are salivating at the prospect of what would be a catastrophic sign for the Labour party…because Andy Burnham is a threat to St Keir.
